title: Polish Kielbasa Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with Polish kielbasa and rich flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the kielbasa and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the kielbasa from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the kielbasa to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
